data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the claim status workflow (open, reviewing, approved, closed) as specified in the linked use case. However, the prior steps do not provide any evidence of the claim status being tracked or transitioned through these states. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in the implementation of this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of claim status workflow states (open, reviewing, approved, closed) being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add claim status workflow validation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that claims can transition through the defined statuses (open, reviewing, approved, closed).
